players.name: Dayne St. Clair
players.bio: Dayne Tristan St. Clair (born May 9, 1997) is a Canadian professional soccer player who currently plays as a goalkeeper for Major League Soccer club Inter Miami and the Canada national team. Prior to playing for Minnesota United, St. Clair was a two-year starter for the Maryland Terrapins men's soccer program. With Maryland, he was the starting goalkeeper for their national championship run, where he earned the NCAA Division I Men's Soccer Tournament Most Outstanding Player for the best defensiv

players.name: Alistair Johnston
players.bio:
Alistair William Johnston (born October 8, 1998) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a right-back for Scottish Premiership club Celtic and the Canada National Team.

Johnston previously played in Major League Soccer for Nashville SC and CF Montréal, and in League1 Ontario for the Vaughan Azzurri.

Johnston was born in Vancouver to a Canadian father and Irish mother from Poleglass. His family moved to Montreal when he was four, where he began playing soccer with Lakeshore SC

players.name: Alfie Jones
players.bio:
Alfie Charles Jones (born 7 October 1997) is a professional soccer player who plays as a defender or midfielder for EFL Championship club Middlesbrough. Born in England, he plays for the Canada national team.

Jones grew up in Long Ashton, a small village on the outskirts of Bristol. He attended Backwell School and played at the Southampton Academy in Bath.

Jones played on loan for Scottish Premiership club St Mirren during the 2018–19 season, but the agreement was terminated by St Mirren i

players.name: Luc de Fougerolles
players.bio:
Luc Rollet de Fougerolles (born 12 October 2005) is a professional soccer player who plays as a defender for Belgian Pro League club Dender EH, on loan from Fulham. Born in England, he represents the Canada national team. 
De Fougerolles began playing soccer as a 5 year old with BHFC Battersea. He moved to the Fulham Academy at the age of 8, and worked his way through their youth categories. On 6 April 2023, he signed a professional contract with Fulham. On 20 June 2023, he was named "Scholar o

players.name: Joel Waterman
players.bio:
Joel Robert Waterman (born January 24, 1996) is a Canadian soccer player who plays as a centre-back, right-back or defensive midfielder for Chicago Fire of Major League Soccer and the Canada national team. 
Club career
Kitsap Pumas
In 2016, Waterman signed with American Premier Development League side Kitsap Pumas and made eleven appearances that season.

TSS FC Rovers
In 2017, Waterman returned to Canada, joining Vancouver-based TSS FC Rovers, where he made eleven appearances.

Calgary

players.name: Mathieu Choinière
players.bio: Mathieu Choinière (born February 7, 1999) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a central midfielder, defensive midfielder or right winger for Major League Soccer club Los Angeles FC and the Canada national team.

players.name: Stephen Eustáquio
players.bio:
Stephen Antunes Eustáquio (born 21 December 1996) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a midfielder for Major League Soccer club Los Angeles FC, on loan from Primeira Liga club Porto, and vice-captains the Canada national team. 

After starting out at Nazarenos, he has played club soccer for Torreense, Leixões, Chaves, Cruz Azul, Paços de Ferreira and Porto.

Born in Canada, Eustáquio represented Portugal at youth level. However, in 2019 he committed to play for Canada and d

players.name: Ismaël Koné
players.bio: Ismaël Kenneth Jordan Koné (born June 16, 2002) is a professional soccer player who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Sassuolo. Born in Ivory Coast, he plays for the Canada national team.

players.name: Cyle Larin
players.bio:
Cyle Christopher Larin (/ˈkaɪl/; born April 17, 1995) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a striker or a left winger for Eredivisie club Feyenoord, on loan from La Liga club Mallorca, and the Canada national team.

After playing college soccer for the UConn Huskies, Larin was the first pick of the 2015 MLS SuperDraft, joining Orlando City. In his first MLS season, he broke the record for most goals by a rookie, scoring 17 in 27 games and earning the MLS Rookie of the Year Awa

players.name: Jonathan David
players.bio:
Jonathan Christian David (born January 14, 2000) is a professional football player who plays as a forward for Serie A club Juventus and the Canada national team.
Born in the United States to Haitian parents, he represents the Canada national team.

David was born in New York City, but moved to Haiti when he was still a baby, and emigrated to Ottawa, Canada at the age of six. He started out with several youth teams in Ottawa before moving abroad to Belgium, where he recorded his professional d

players.name: Liam Millar
players.bio:
Liam Alan Millar (born September 27, 1999) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as an attacking midfielder or left winger for EFL Championship club Hull City and the Canada national team.

Millar featured in the youth ranks of Brampton Youth SC and North Mississauga SC before moving to England to join Fulham Academy aged 13. After three years with Fulham, he joined the Liverpool Academy in 2016.

players.name: Tani Oluwaseyi
players.bio: Tanitoluwa Oluwatimilehin Oluwaseyi (born May 15, 2000) is a professional soccer player who plays as a forward for La Liga side Villarreal. Born in Nigeria, he represents the Canada national team.

players.name: Derek Cornelius
players.bio: Derek Austin Cornelius (born 25 November 1997) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a centre-back for Ligue 1 club Marseille and the Canada national team.

players.name: Jacob Shaffelburg
players.bio:
Jacob Everett Shaffelburg (born November 26, 1999) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a winger for Major League Soccer club Los Angeles FC and the Canada national team. 

Club career
Youth
Shaffelburg played youth soccer for Valley United SC and Team Nova Scotia, as well as with Manhattan SC where he won U.S. Club Soccer U-16 National Championship in 2016. He played a game with Toronto FC III in League1 Ontario in 2017 League1 Ontario season. Shaffelburg played for the Boy

players.name: Moïse Bombito
players.bio: Moïse Bombito Lumpungu (born March 30, 2000) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a centre-back for Ligue 1 club Nice and the Canada national team.

players.name: Maxime Crépeau
players.bio:
Maxime Crépeau (born May 11, 1994) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a goalkeeper for Major League Soccer club Orlando City and the Canada national team.

Crépeau is a product of the Montreal Impact Academy, and signed with the Montreal Impact first team in 2013. In 2016, Crépeau made his debut for the Canada national team. While at Montreal Impact, Crépeau spent most of his time at the team on loan to FC Montreal and Ottawa Fury, but in 2019, Crépeau was traded to the Vanc

players.name: Tajon Buchanan
players.bio: Tajon Trevor Buchanan (born February 8, 1999) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays for La Liga club Villarreal and the Canada national team. Known for his speed and technical ability, he usually plays as a wide midfielder, but can also be deployed as a full-back.

players.name: Owen Goodman
players.bio: Owen Olamidayo Goodman (born 27 November 2003) is an professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for EFL League One club Barnsley, on loan from Premier League club Crystal Palace. Born in England, he represented both his country of birth and Canada at youth international level, before committing to Canada in October 2025 and gaining Canadian citizenship.

players.name: Alphonso Davies
players.bio:
Alphonso Boyle Davies (born November 2, 2000) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a winger for Bundesliga club Bayern Munich and the Canada national team. He was the first player born in the 2000s to play in a Major League Soccer match. Davies joined Bayern in January 2019 from MLS side Vancouver Whitecaps FC on a contract lasting until 2023 for a then-MLS record transfer fee.

In June 2017, he became the youngest player to appear for the Canadian men's national team. By scor

players.name: Jonathan Osorio
players.bio:
Jonathan Osorio (born June 12, 1992) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a midfielder for Major League Soccer club Toronto FC and the Canadian national team. He holds the Toronto FC club record for most appearances.

Youth soccer
Osorio began playing soccer with the Brampton Youth Soccer at age 10. When he was 15, he moved to Clarkson Sheridan SC and graduated from St. Edmund Campion Secondary School. In 2010, he went to Uruguay to play with Nacional's academy, where he play

players.name: Richie Laryea
players.bio: Richmond Mamah Laryea (born January 7, 1995) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a right-back or midfielder for Major League Soccer club Toronto FC and the Canada national team.

players.name: Niko Sigur
players.bio: Niko Kristian Sigur (born September 9, 2003) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a defensive midfielder or right-back for HNL club Hajduk Split and the Canada national team.

players.name: Promise David
players.bio: Promise Oluwatobi Emmanuel David Akinpelu (born July 3, 2001), known as Promise David, is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a striker for Belgian Pro League club Union SG and the Canada national team.

players.name: Nathan Saliba
players.bio:
Nathan-Dylan Saliba (born February 7, 2004) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays for Belgian Pro League club Anderlecht and the Canada national team.

Saliba began playing youth soccer at age nine with CS Longueuil. In 2017, he joined the Montreal Impact Academy. He is of Haitian descent through both his parents, and can speak English, French and Haitian Creole.

Club career
In December 2020, he signed his first professional contract with the Montreal Impact (later re-named CF

players.name: Jayden Nelson
players.bio:
Jayden Nelson (born September 26, 2002) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a winger for Major League Soccer club Austin FC and the Canada national team.

Nelson began playing for Toronto FC Academy in the USSDA in 2016, playing for the U14 team. He has since played for the U16/17 and U18/19 teams as well.

Nelson made his debut for Toronto FC III in League1 Ontario on September 2, 2017 in a game against Toronto Skillz FC. He scored his first goal for Toronto FC III on June
